description: Trigger VAM events via spoken keywords. Supports Windows Speech Recognition (legacy) and Vosk Companion (future-proof offline speech via a companion app over localhost UDP, independent of Windows speech services).
credits: Based on VeeRifter's VoiceControl plugin, which was itself based on Almadiel's original VoiceTrigger plugin. MacGruber/Acidbubbles for TriggerHandler. Acidbubbles for text input field. MeshedVR for HUD example.
instructions: Add VoiceControl2.cslist as a plugin on any atom or as a scene plugin. Select your speech backend from the dropdown. For Vosk Companion, run VoskCompanion.exe before launching VAM.
